title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE KABANÂ­KALAN MATERNITY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KABANKALAN, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO DR. GUMERSINDO GARCIA,  SR. MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11726 / 65 OG No. 17, 4214 (April 28, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5199, April 27, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE KABANÂKALAN MATERNITY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KABANKALAN, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO DR. GUMERSINDO GARCIA, SR. MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Kabankalan Maternity Hospital, in the Municipality of Kabankalan, Province of Negros Occidental, is hereby changed to Dr. Gumersindo Garcia, Sr. Memorial Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, April 27, 1968.
